review: Absolutely love this service - the recipes have been fantastic and customer support is top-tier. Will keep subscribing for years.
Cancelling my subscription. Three weeks in a row the box arrived late and customer service didn't even apologise. Done with this.
It's fine I guess. The food is okay but I can find similar quality elsewhere for cheaper.
Best decision I made this year. The variety, the freshness, the convenience - 10/10.
Quality has dropped noticeably over the last few months. If this continues I'll be looking for an alternative.
Decent product, decent price. Nothing to write home about but I'm not unhappy.
Outstanding! Recommended this to all my friends. Keep up the great work.
App keeps crashing, deliveries are unreliable, and the new menu is awful. Why am I still paying for this?
I like the meals but portion sizes have shrunk while prices went up. Not sure how much longer I'll stay.
Worth every penny. The recipes are creative, ingredients are always fresh.
Just discovered a competitor with better pricing - probably switching next month.
Some weeks are great, others are forgettable. Inconsistent.
Five years a customer and still impressed. They keep innovating.
Tried to pause my subscription and they made it impossibly hard. Now I'm angry.
Fine for now. Might explore alternatives in the new year.
